title: Validation, Confirmation, and Modal Patterns — NXGN Actions Web
purpose: **AI Summary**: Form validation uses per-field `computed()` error arrays (`string[]`) and a single `isFormValid` computed that gates the Save button. Aggregate root entities load unique names from the server for duplicate detection; aggregate children check siblings in the parent capture state. Destructive actions always use `ConfirmationDialogService`. Domain commands use the `confirm()` variant with contextual labels. Modals use `NgbModal` with static backdrop for one-time-display data. All...

examples.name: Validation Flow Example 1
examples.code:
Field input
  → computed nameErrors(): string[]        ← per-field validation
  → computed slugErrors(): string[]        ← per-field validation
  → computed duplicateName(): boolean      ← duplicate detection (children)
  → computed isFormValid(): boolean        ← gates Save button
  → template [errors]="nameErrors()"      ← inline display
  → nxgn-capture-page-title [isValid]     ← Save button enabled/disabled

sections.title: Prerequisites
content: | `@nxgn-solutions/ui` | `ConfirmationDialogService`, form field components with `[errors]` binding | [UI Components](ui-components.md) |
| `@ngx-translate/core` | All user-facing strings (validation messages, confirmation text) | [Overview — Required Packages](overview.md#required-packages) |
| `ngx-toastr` | Page-level success/error feedback after mutations | [Overview — Required Packages](overview.md#required-packages) |
Install these before implementing. See [Overview](web-overview.md) for setup instructions.

sections.title: Validation Flow
content: → computed isFormValid(): boolean        ← gates Save button

sections.title: Per-Field Validation
content: Each editable field has a `computed()` returning a `string[]` of error messages. Empty array = valid. The array is passed to form field components via `[errors]`.
// ✓ Correct — computed error array with translated messages
<!-- ✓ Correct — pass error array to form field component -->
if (n.length > 255) errors.push('Name must be 255 characters or fewer.');
Use a private helper to synchronously resolve translation keys within computed signals:
private t(key: string, params?: Record<string, unknown>): string {
> `TranslateService.instant()` is synchronous and safe inside `computed()`. Use `firstValueFrom(this.translate.get())` only in async methods (confirmation dialogs, toastr).

sections.title: Duplicate Detection
content: Two variants depending on whether the entity is an aggregate root or an aggregate child.
Aggregate root entities (Actions, Workflows) load unique names from the server and check client-side for immediate feedback.
// Signal holding taken names (excludes the entity being edited)
// Load during entity load (edit mode) — exclude current entity
// Load during init (create mode) — all names
The feature service exposes the unique names endpoint:
**Why client-side**: Immediate feedback without a round-trip per keystroke. The server still enforces uniqueness as the final authority — the client check is a UX optimization.

Child entities within an aggregate (e.g., consultations within an action, evidence within an action) check duplicates against siblings in the parent capture state. No server call needed — the parent already holds the full list.
/** Existing names for duplicate detection (excludes the one being edited) */
<!-- Child entities use @if for duplicate display (no [errors] binding) -->
| Entity Type | Source | Signal Type | Example |
| Aggregate root | Server `getUniqueNames()` | `signal<string[]>` → folded into `nameErrors` | Actions, Workflows |
| Aggregate child | Parent capture state | `computed(() => boolean)` → separate `duplicateName` | Consultations, Action Evidences |

sections.title: Form-Level Validity
content: A single `isFormValid` computed gates the Save button via `nxgn-capture-page-title [isValid]`:
// Field-level error arrays (catches duplicates, pattern violations)
- Checks field-level error arrays — catches duplicates and pattern violations
- Checks child-level duplicate booleans where applicable
- Returns `false` if any validation rule fails

sections.title: Regex Constants
content: Define at top of file, outside the class. Share across components that need the same pattern.
| `EMPTY_GUID` | Sentinel for new entities in SaveRequest | All capture components |
| `GUID_REGEX` | Detect edit mode from route `:id` param | All capture components |
| `SLUG_REGEX` | Validate slug field format | Action, Workflow capture |
| `CLIENT_ID_REGEX` | Validate evidence identifier format | ActionEvidence capture |

content: In create mode, auto-generate slug from name. Stop auto-generating once the user manually edits the slug field.

sections.title: Confirmation Dialog
content: `ConfirmationDialogService` from `@nxgn-solutions/ui` wraps `NgbModal`. All confirmation text MUST use `ngx-translate`.
Used on list pages for multi-select delete operations.
Used on capture pages for status changes, destructive operations, and irreversible actions.
| `confirmDelete(title, message)` | Both strings (translated) | Bulk delete on list pages |
| `confirm(message, title, options?)` | `options.variant`: `'primary'` \| `'danger'`; `options.confirmLabel`: string | Domain commands, status toggles |
| Status toggle (activate/deactivate) | Always | `confirm()` with `variant: 'danger'` for deactivate |
| Enable/disable child resource | Always for disable, skip for enable | `confirm()` |
| Save (create/update) | Never — `isFormValid` gates the button | N/A |

sections.title: Modal Pattern
content: Use `NgbModal` directly (not `ConfirmationDialogService`) for content display modals — data that must be shown once and cannot be retrieved again (e.g., generated secrets).
private async showSecretsModal(generatedUrls: Record<string, string>): Promise<void> {
- Always `await modalRef.result` in a try/catch — modal dismissal throws
- Do NOT use modals for list→capture navigation — use child routes ([Routing](routing.md))

sections.title: Inline Error Display
content: Display API errors as inline alerts, not toasters. Clear on next save attempt.
const msg = (err as { error?: { errors?: { message?: string }[] } })
Show an inline spinner while the save is in progress:

sections.title: Notification Rules
content: | API error on save | Inline alert (`errorMessage` signal) | Server validation message |
| API error on load | Inline alert (`errorMessage` signal) | "Failed to load action" |
| Field validation | `[errors]` on form component | Per-field error array |
| Duplicate name | `[errors]` or `@if` inline text | "This name is already in use" |
| Saving in progress | Inline spinner alert | Spinner + "Saving..." |
// ✓ Correct — toastr only for page-level mutation results

import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, computed, effect, inject, input, signal } from '@angular/core';
const msg = (err as { error?: { errors?: { message?: string }[] } })
private t(key: string, params?: Record<string, unknown>): string {

sections.title: Departures from Capstone
content: | Field validation | `ControlValueAccessor` + `Validator` on shared input components | `computed(() => string[])` per field in capture component | Simpler, no wrapper needed. Signal-native (ADR-0006). Error arrays visible to `isFormValid` without form API. |
| Duplicate detection | `loadUniqueValues()` via `CapturePageService` | `getUniqueNames()` via feature service | Feature-colocated services (ADR-0007). No shared capture-page service. |

| Confirmation API | `confirm(config: ConfirmationDialogConfig)` with `showOk`/`showSave`/`showCancel` flags | `confirm(message, title, { variant, confirmLabel })` | Simplified API in `@nxgn-solutions/ui` v2. Same library, updated method signature. |
| Validation messages | Hardcoded English in some components | `ngx-translate` keys everywhere | i18n requirement for Actions platform |
| Success notifications | Not consistently used | `ToastrService.success()` after every mutation | User feedback for all state changes |

- [Routing](routing.md) — Child routes for aggregate children (not modals)
